description: Create a project Skill document or an app Skill package with explicit metadata. Use this instead of `knowledge_create` whenever the target is a Skill. Dependency-bearing Skills that require CLI tools, binaries, scripts, Unity C# files, package-local runtime assets, or package-registered tools must use `kind: "package"`. Package creation writes under the Locus app Skill package directory, such as `%APPDATA%/locus/skills/<package-id>/` on Windows, with `skill.json` for Locus metadata and a plain `SKILL.md` for model-facing instructions. Returns a plain-text status line with the created Skill path, command trigger, and packageRoot for package Skills. For packages, omit `packageId` to derive a short kebab-case package id from `name`; provide `packageId` for distributed packages or when a specific namespace is needed.

kind.description: Create a single Markdown Skill document (`md`) only for text-only SOPs, or an app-installed Skill package (`package`) for Skills with dependencies such as CLI tools, binaries, scripts, Unity C# files, or bundled docs/assets.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case Skill name for documents, or display-oriented package name when `kind` is `package`.

path.description: Document-only Skill path. Accepts `asset-audit.md`, `unity/asset-audit.md`, or `skill/unity/asset-audit.md`. When omitted, uses `<name>.md`.

packageId.description: Package-only app Skill package id, for example `asset-audit`, `studio.tools.asset-audit`, or `io.github.user.asset-audit`. When omitted, Locus derives the short `<name-slug>` package id.

version.description: Package-only required semantic version, for example `0.1.0`.

summary.description: Required one-line Skill description or package description.

body.description: Optional body for the Skill `## Content` section. Omit to create the standard scaffold.

commandTrigger.description: Optional slash command trigger. Defaults to `/<name>`.

commandEnabled.description: Whether the Skill should expose a slash command. Defaults to true.

tools.description: Document-only list of Locus tool names this Skill needs on the first turn when invoked by slash command. Use for lazy or Skill-mode tools such as skill_create, skill_reload, or graph_view.

modelInvocationEnabled.description: Package-only metadata for automatic model invocation. Defaults to true.
